common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to generate first mile tracking number for courier delivery method.

request_params.description: The shipment method for generate and bind orders. Available value: courier_delivery.
request_params.name: shipment_method

request_params.description: Use this field to specify the region you want to ship parcel. Available value: CN.
request_params.name: region

request_params.description: The list of order_sn. You can specify up to 50 order_sns in this call. One fm_tn maximum number of total bind orders is 10000.
request_params.name: order_list

children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order. You should fill the field with empty string when there isn't a package number.
children.name: package_number

request_params.description: The set of information you need to generate FM tracking number and bind orders.
request_params.name: courier_delivery_info

children.description: The identity of address. Retrieved from v2.logistics.get_address_list, address_type need to be FIRST_MILE_PICKUP_ADDRESS.
children.name: address_id

children.description: The identity of transit warehouse address. Retrieved from v2.first_mile.get_transit_warehouse_list.
children.name: warehouse_id

children.description:
The definition of logistics product ID: 

1010003 (kuaidi100 to C) - seller book courier pickup and pay offline

1010004 (kuaidi100 prepaid(MP)) - seller can use prepaid account to place courier order, so prepaid_account_id is required
children.name: logistics_product_id

children.description: The identity of courier service. Retrieved from v2.first_mile.get_courier_delivery_channel_list.
children.name: courier_service_id

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order.

children.sample: Package (order_sn: 2004239MRBBFPJ, package_number: ) has been bind to first mile code.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/first_mile/generate_and_bind_first_mile_tracking_number?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "courier_delivery_info": {
        "address_id": 11222,
        "courier_service_id": "LCN70002",
        "logistics_product_id": 1010004,
        "prepaid_account_id": 21,
        "warehouse_id": "ECP04"
    },
    "order_list": [
        {
            "order_sn": "2410106R7TSAJR"
        },
        {
            "order_sn": "2004239MRBBFPJ"
        }
    ],
    "region": "CN",
    "shipment_method": "courier_delivery"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
